acceptedFindings.message: Prefer exact local runtime ports instead of wildcard localhost connect-src entries in production.
Prefer exact local runtime ports instead of wildcard localhost connect-src entries in production.
Avoid fs:default; list only the exact filesystem operations the app needs.
Filesystem scopes should be vault-specific or app-data-specific, not broad user directories.

Production Tauri builds must not expose the global window.__TAURI__ bridge; use explicit imports from @tauri-apps/api instead.

newFindings.message: Write permissions in CI must be justified by a dedicated release or reporting workflow.
